name: 可迭代对象与迭代器混淆
description: Treats iterable and iterator as identical.
remediation_strategy: Contrast iter(list) with the list and test next support.

name: 迭代器对象与元素混淆
description: Confuses the iterator with the value it yields.
remediation_strategy: Trace iterator, yielded element, and state separately.

name: iter 与 next 混淆
description: Uses iter() when next() is required or vice versa.
remediation_strategy: Use paired examples with different surface forms.

name: 误认为 iter 推进状态
remediation_strategy: Compare repeated iter() and next() calls.

name: next 参数错误
description: Passes a non-iterator where an iterator is expected.
remediation_strategy: Ask which object owns iteration state.

name: 迭代器耗尽理解错误
description: Assumes an exhausted iterator restarts automatically.

name: 未识别 StopIteration
description: Does not connect exhaustion with StopIteration.
remediation_strategy: Predict the exception after the final value.

name: for 循环协议混淆
description: Does not relate for loops to iter and next.
remediation_strategy: Expand a small for loop into protocol steps.

name: 生成器与迭代器混淆
description: Misstates the relationship between generators and iterators.
remediation_strategy: Delay until iterator fundamentals are stable.
